blended.narrative: Cranmore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
